mapper.sql: visit_id AS "visitId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", work_order_id AS "workOrderId", task_id AS "taskId", appointment_id AS "appointmentId", visit_sequence AS "visitSequence", technician_id AS "technicianId", network_id AS "networkId", status, check_in_captured_at AS "checkInCapturedAt", check_in_received_at AS "checkInReceivedAt", check_in_latitude AS "checkInLatitude", check_in_longitude AS "checkInLongitude", check_in_accuracy_meters AS "checkInAccuracyMeters", geofence_result AS "geofenceResult", geofence_distance_meters AS "geofenceDistanceMeters", geofence_policy_version AS "geofencePolicyVersion", policy_decision AS "policyDecision", device_id AS "deviceId", device_command_id AS "deviceCommandId", offline_flag AS "offlineFlag", check_out_captured_at AS "checkOutCapturedAt", check_out_received_at AS "checkOutReceivedAt", result_code AS "resultCode", exception_code AS "exceptionCode", note, operation_refs::text AS "operationRefs", evidence_refs::text AS "evidenceRefs", aggregate_version AS "aggregateVersion", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fld_visit WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND visit_id = #{visitId}

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", target_latitude AS "targetLatitude", target_longitude AS "targetLongitude", radius_meters AS "radiusMeters", max_accuracy_meters AS "maxAccuracyMeters", exception_action AS "exceptionAction", policy_version AS "policyVersion" FROM fld_geofence_policy WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(visit_sequence), 0) + 1 FROM fld_visit WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fld_visit ( visit_id, tenant_id, project_id, work_order_id, task_id, appointment_id, visit_sequence, technician_id, network_id, status, check_in_captured_at, check_in_received_at, check_in_latitude, check_in_longitude, check_in_accuracy_meters, geofence_result, geofence_distance_meters, geofence_policy_version, policy_decision, device_id, device_command_id, offline_flag, aggregate_version, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{visitId}, #{tenantId}, #{projectId}, #{workOrderId}, #{taskId}, #{appointmentId}, #{visitSequence}, #{technicianId}, #{networkId}, #{status}, #{checkInCapturedAt}, #{checkInReceivedAt}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{accuracyMeters}, #{geofenceResult}, #{geofenceDistanceMeters}, #{geofencePolicyVersion}, #{policyDecision}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceCommandId}, #{offline}, #{aggregateVersion}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE fld_visit SET status = #{newStatus}, check_out_captured_at = #{capturedAt}, check_out_received_at = #{receivedAt}, result_code = #{resultCode}, exception_code = #{exceptionCode}, note = #{note}, operation_refs = CAST(#{operationRefs} AS jsonb), evidence_refs = CAST(#{evidenceRefs} AS jsonb), aggregate_version = aggregate_version + 1, updated_at = #{receivedAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND visit_id = #{visitId} AND aggregate_version = #{expectedVersion} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fld_visit_fact ( visit_fact_id, tenant_id, visit_id, aggregate_version, fact_type, captured_at, received_at, latitude, longitude, accuracy_meters, geofence_result, result_code, exception_code, note, reference_list, actor_id, device_id, offline_flag) VALUES ( #{visitFactId}, #{tenantId}, #{visitId}, #{aggregateVersion}, #{factType}, #{capturedAt}, #{receivedAt}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{accuracyMeters}, #{geofenceResult}, #{resultCode}, #{exceptionCode}, #{note}, CAST(#{referenceList} AS jsonb), #{actorId}, #{deviceId}, #{offline})

INSERT INTO fld_visit_command_result ( tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, visit_id, status, aggregate_version, geofence_result, policy_decision, occurred_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{visitId}, #{status}, #{aggregateVersion}, #{geofenceResult}, #{policyDecision}, #{occurredAt})
